differentials.name: Greater trochanteric bursae (a)  Trochanteric bursa Location:   covers posterior facet, beneath gluteus maximus muscle + iliotibial tract (b)  Subgluteus medius bursa
differentials.raw: Greater trochanteric bursae (a)  Trochanteric bursa Location:   covers posterior facet, beneath gluteus maximus muscle + iliotibial tract (b)  Subgluteus medius bursa

context: Location:   surrounds iliopsoas tendon √  largest bursa in body √  communication with hip in 15% Location:   covers superior portion of lateral facet, beneath lateral portion of gluteus medius m. (c)  Subgluteus minimus bursa Location:   covers superomedial portion of anterior facet, beneath + medial to gluteus minimus m. Location:   posteroinferior communication of hip joint capsule
